suite.name: Extension Loading

kw.name: Start Studio Pro With Extension
Validate E2E Environment
Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Directory Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given path points to an existing directory.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

kw.name: Directory Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given path points to an existing directory.

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

Log

kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

kw.name: Join Path
kw.doc: Joins the given path part(s) to the given base path.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.

kw.name: Launch Application With Args
kw.doc: Launches an application with given arguments.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Should Not Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are equal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Checks if element exists. If element exists True will be returned otherwise False. If element could not be found by xpath False will be returned.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Skip Sign In If Present
Element Should Exist
kw.doc: Checks if element exists. If element exists True will be returned otherwise False. If element could not be found by xpath False will be returned.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Focus
kw.doc: Try to focus element by given xpath.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Focus
kw.msg: FlaUiError: Element '/Window[contains(@Name,'Mendix Studio Pro')]/Pane/Pane' is not focusable

Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\hostedtoolcache\windows\Python\3.12.10\x64\Lib\site-packages\robotlibcore\core\dynamic.py", line 25, in run_keyword return self.keywords[name](*args, **(kwargs or {})) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\hostedtoolcache\windows\Python\3.12.10\x64\Lib\site-packages\FlaUILibrary\keywords\element.py", line 104, in focus module.action(Element.Action.FOCUS_ELEMENT, File "C:\hostedtoolcache\windows\Python\3.12.10\x64\Lib\site-packages\FlaUILibrary\flaui\automation\uia.py", line 62, in action raise FlaUiError(msg) if msg is not None else error File "C:\hostedtoolcache\windows\Python\3.12.10\x64\Lib\site-packages\FlaUILibrary\flaui\automation\uia.py", line 54, in action return self._actions[action].execute_action(action, values) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\hostedtoolcache\windows\Python\3.12.10\x64\Lib\site-packages\FlaUILibrary\flaui\module\element.py", line 164, in execute_action return switcher.get(action, lambda: FlaUiError.raise_fla_ui_error(FlaUiError.ActionNotSupported))() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\hostedtoolcache\windows\Python\3.12.10\x64\Lib\site-packages\FlaUILibrary\flaui\module\element.py", line 116, in <lambda> lambda: self._focus_element(values), ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\hostedtoolcache\windows\Python\3.12.10\x64\Lib\site-packages\FlaUILibrary\flaui\module\element.py", line 603, in _focus_element raise FlaUiError(FlaUiError.ElementNotFocusable.format(xpath)) from None FlaUILibrary.flaui.exception.flauierror.FlaUiError: Element '/Window[contains(@Name,'Mendix Studio Pro')]/Pane/Pane' is not focusable
kw.doc: Try to focus element by given xpath.
kw.status: FlaUiError: Element '/Window[contains(@Name,'Mendix Studio Pro')]/Pane/Pane' is not focusable

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Press Key
kw.doc: Keyboard control to execute a user defined one shortcut or text. press_only and release_only supports key shortcut only, not text.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Element Should Exist
kw.doc: Checks if element exists. If element exists True will be returned otherwise False. If element could not be found by xpath False will be returned.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Fail
kw.arg: Could not dismiss sign-in dialog after 5 Escape attempts
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
Dismiss the sign-in dialog by pressing Escape. The sign-in content is rendered in a WebView2 so we cannot click UI elements directly. Pressing Escape skips the sign-in.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Resolve Main Window Locator' failed after retrying for 30 seconds. The last error was: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.

robot.errors.UserKeywordExecutionFailed: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
AssertionError: Keyword 'Resolve Main Window Locator' failed after retrying for 30 seconds. The last error was: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
kw.status: Keyword 'Resolve Main Window Locator' failed after retrying for 30 seconds. The last error was: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.arg: Pane diagnostics: primary_window=${primary_exists}, app_window=${app_exists}, active_main_locator=${MAIN_WINDOW}, active_main_exists=${main_exists}, extensions_menu=${extensions_exists}, mxlint_menu_item=${menu_item_exists}, mxlint_pane=${pane_exists}

Element Should Exist
kw.doc: Checks if element exists. If element exists True will be returned otherwise False. If element could not be found by xpath False will be returned.

kw.doc: Checks if element exists. If element exists True will be returned otherwise False. If element could not be found by xpath False will be returned.

kw.name: Fail
kw.msg: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.
Traceback (most recent call last): None AssertionError: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.

kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.

kw.doc: Resolve active Studio Pro main window locator based on current window title.
kw.status: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Exist
kw.doc: Waits until element exist or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.name: Focus
kw.doc: Try to focus element by given xpath.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Exist
kw.doc: Waits until element exist or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.status: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Open MxLint Pane Once' failed after retrying for 20 seconds. The last error was: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.

robot.errors.UserKeywordExecutionFailed: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
AssertionError: Keyword 'Open MxLint Pane Once' failed after retrying for 20 seconds. The last error was: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
kw.status: Keyword 'Open MxLint Pane Once' failed after retrying for 20 seconds. The last error was: Could not resolve Studio Pro main window locator.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
